scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @callsheet/core build && pnpm --filter @callsheet/react-query build && pnpm --filter @callsheet/ts-rest build && pnpm --filter @callsheet/codegen build
scripts.test: pnpm run test:workspace && pnpm run check:example-generated && pnpm run build:packages && pnpm run test:types
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter @callsheet/core test:coverage && pnpm --filter @callsheet/react-query test:coverage && pnpm --filter @callsheet/codegen test:coverage
scripts.test:types: pnpm --filter @callsheet/core test:types && pnpm --filter @callsheet/react-query test:types && pnpm --filter @callsheet/codegen test:types
scripts.check:example-generated: pnpm --filter @callsheet/example-app generate && git diff --exit-code -- apps/example-app/src/graphql/generated.ts apps/example-app/src/generated/calls.ts
